meaning: n.锭子,纺锤,细长的人(或物),轴,杆,心轴v.长得细长,装锭子于adj.锭子的,锭子似的
examples: The princess took the spindle and began to try and spin.
In her works, the spiraling spindle represented the beginning of chaos.
The spindle shaped cells arranged in fascicular, whorled and storiform.
James Gray, 46, who lived at Spindle Farm, Amersham, was jailed for animal cruelty offences.
Nidec makes over 75% of all the spindle motors used in the HDD industry.
